title: Develop Rmd for pre-Plan Team data summaries
body:
There is a request from both assessment supervisors for a summary of the Plan Team figures delivered ahead of Plan Team (like a week before). This would contain the same materials as the Plan Team slides but be a standalone doc, minimal or no interpretation needed, just the plots. Sounds like it would be very much appreciated by assessment people and by the SSC.

This will use code that is already developed for PT slides, and will just be in a Markdown doc. 

From Melissa:

> "During this past cycle, we encountered SSC questions that a document including figures with design-based time series of survey biomass and length- and age-compositions for all assessed species could have easily answered beforehand. This could be an informational or reference document added to the September eagenda, in addition to the usual slide survey presentation."

From Chris:

> "...the idea is to basically have the survey slides that get presented at Plan Team in an organized document for reference.  No interpretation is needed.   The real “bonus” thing would be to combine species into complexes if assessed that way.  Basically allowing Council folks to figure it out on a stock by stock basis  if not done by the authors.  We can also chat more on age comps - not sure if they will be very easy but biomass and length comps are a big help on most recent survey and if possible along w biomass trends over time."
